pfs.note: This spell is thematically appropriate for warfare, but not for Pathfinder Society.

defense.critical_failure:
The creature is afflicted with blister pox at stage 2.  
  
**Blister Pox** (disease) **Level** 5; A creature can’t reduce its sickened value below 1 while it’s taking persistent bleed damage from blister pox; **Stage 1** sickened 2 (1 round); **Stage 2** sickened 2 and 1d6 persistent bleed damage (1 round); **Stage 3** sickened 2 and 2d6 persistent bleed damage (1 round); **Stage 4** sickened 3 and 2d6 persistent bleed damage (1 day)
defense.critical_success: The creature is unaffected and immune to blister pox for 1 week.
defense.failure: The creature is afflicted with blister pox at stage 1.

spell.name: Blister Bomb
spell.text: You launch a small bomb enchanted with a fast-acting skin disease at your foes, causing their skin to break out in horrible bleeding sores. All creatures in the area of the burst must attempt a Fortitude save.

traits.name: Concentrate
traits.text: An action with this trait requires a degree of mental concentration and discipline.

traits.name: Disease
traits.text: An effect with this trait applies one or more diseases. A disease is typically an affliction.

traits.name: Manipulate
traits.text: You must physically manipulate an item or make gestures to use an action with this trait. Creatures without a suitable appendage can’t perform actions with this trait. Manipulate actions often trigger reactions.
